chapter_title.en: Chapter 68 – Goodly relationship with the relatives

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (384/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (384/ 8)
text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي أُحِبُّ أَنْ يَعْلَمَ اللَّهُ أَنِّي قَدْ أَذْلَلْتُ رَقَبَتِي فِي رَحِمِي وَ أَنِّي لَأُبَادِرُ أَهْلَ بَيْتِي أَصِلُهُمْ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْتَغْنُوا عَنِّي .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Dawood Bin Farqad who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> would love it for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> to Know that I<sup>asws</sup> have humbled my<sup>asws</sup> neck regarding my kinship and I<sup>asws</sup> hasten to my<sup>asws</sup> family members to helping them before they become self-sufficient of me<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 25. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Dawud ibn Farqad who has said the following: “Once abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) said to me, ‘I love to show Allah humbling of my neck for my relatives and that I hasten to do good to my relatives and maintain good relations with them before they become independent of me.’”
